# ❓ Support / Incident Pull Request

## Related Issue
- Link the issue(s) this PR addresses:
  Closes #<issue_number>

## Description
- What is the problem or incident?
- What change is being introduced to resolve it?
- Relevant context for reviewers (logs, environment, symptoms):

## Investigation & Resolution

### Investigation
- How was the issue identified?
- Steps taken to reproduce / confirm:
  - ...

### Resolution
- Fix or mitigation applied:
  - ...
- Configuration changes (if any):
  - ...
- Dependencies impacted:
  - ...

### Temporary Measures (if applicable)
- Workarounds or temporary fixes:
  - ...
- Follow-up actions are required:
  - ...

## Testing

### Verification
- [ ] Issue successfully reproduced before fix
- [ ] Fix verified in relevant environment
- [ ] All affected components are checked

### Validation
- [ ] No regression observed
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## Documentation
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Incident notes / postmortem added (if applicable)
- [ ] Examples / screenshots / logs attached

## Checklist
- [ ] Issue linked
- [ ] Incident clearly described
- [ ] Root cause understood (if possible)
- [ ] Fix validated

## Risks / Impact
- Severity level:
  - [ ] None
  - [ ] Low
  - [ ] Medium
  - [ ] High

### Operational Impact
- Possible service disruption:
  - ...
- Affected systems:
  - Core / Runtime / Adapter / Capability

### QA / Support Focus
- Areas requiring monitoring:
  - ...

## Notes

### Technical Notes
- ...

### Support Notes
- Logs, screenshots, timeline, or additional incident context
